en: Then Eliphaz the Temanite answered and said:
zh: 提幔人以利法回答說：

en: "Should a wise man answer with windy knowledge, and fill his belly with the east wind?
zh: “智慧人怎可用虛空的知識來回答呢？ 怎可用東風充滿自己的肚腹呢？

en: Should he argue in unprofitable talk, or in words with which he can do no good?
zh: 他怎可用無益的話，或無用的言詞辯論呢？

en: But you are doing away with the fear of God and hindering meditation before God.
zh: 你還廢棄了敬畏 神的心， 攔阻了在 神面前的默禱。

en: For your iniquity teaches your mouth, and you choose the tongue of the crafty.
zh: 你的罪孽教導你的口， 你採用詭詐人的舌頭，

en: Your own mouth condemns you, and not I; your own lips testify against you.
zh: 是你的口定你的罪，不是我， 你嘴唇作見證控告你。

en: "Are you the first man who was born? Or were you brought forth before the hills?
zh: 你是頭一個生下來的人嗎？ 你在諸山未有之前誕生的嗎？

en: Have you listened in the council of God? And do you limit wisdom to yourself?
zh: 你曾聆聽過 神的密旨嗎？ 你可以獨佔智慧嗎？

en: What do you know that we do not know? What do you understand that is not clear to us?
zh: 有甚麼是你知道，我們不知道的呢？ 你明白，我們不明白的呢？

en: Both the gray-haired and the aged are among us, older than your father.
zh: 我們中間有白頭髮的，又有年紀老的， 年歲比你的父親還大。

en: Are the comforts of God too small for you, or the word that deals gently with you?
zh: 神的安慰對你是否太少？ 溫柔的言語對你是否不足？

en: Why does your heart carry you away, and why do your eyes flash,
zh: 你的心為甚麼迷惑你， 你的眼為甚麼閃出怒光，

en: that you turn your spirit against God and bring such words out of your mouth?
zh: 以致你的心靈轉過來抗拒 神， 從你的口中竟發出這樣的話？

en: What is man, that he can be pure? Or he who is born of a woman, that he can be righteous?
zh: 人是甚麼，能算為潔淨嗎？ 婦人所生的，能算為公義嗎？

en: Behold, God puts no trust in his holy ones, and the heavens are not pure in his sight;
zh: 神不信任他的眾天使， 在他看來，諸天也不潔淨，

en: how much less one who is abominable and corrupt, a man who drinks injustice like water!
zh: 何況那可憎又腐敗， 喝罪孽如同喝水的世人呢？

en: "I will show you; hear me, and what I have seen I will declare
zh: 我要告訴你，你要聽我說。 我所看見的，我要述說，

en: (what wise men have told, without hiding it from their fathers,
zh: 就是智慧人所傳講的， 並沒有隱瞞從他們列祖所領受的。

en: to whom alone the land was given, and no stranger passed among them).
zh: 這地唯獨賜給列祖， 並沒有外族人從他們中間經過。

en: The wicked man writhes in pain all his days, through all the years that are laid up for the ruthless.
zh: 惡人一生飽受痛苦， 一生的年數都為強暴留存。

en: Dreadful sounds are in his ears; in prosperity the destroyer will come upon him.
zh: 恐怖之聲常在他的耳中， 太平的時候，強盜就來襲擊他。

en: He does not believe that he will return out of darkness, and he is marked for the sword.
zh: 他不信他能從黑暗中轉回， 自己留給刀劍殺害。

en: He wanders abroad for bread, saying, 'Where is it?' He knows that a day of darkness is ready at his hand;
zh: 他飄流覓食說：‘哪裡有呢？’ 他知道黑暗的日子已經臨近了。

en: distress and anguish terrify him; they prevail against him, like a king ready for battle.
zh: 患難與困苦使他驚惶， 又勝過他，像君王預備上陣攻擊一樣。

en: Because he has stretched out his hand against God and defies the Almighty,
zh: 因為他向 神揮拳，向全能者逞強，

en: running stubbornly against him with a thickly bossed shield;
zh: 用盾牌的厚凸面， 硬著頸項向他直闖。

en: because he has covered his face with his fat and gathered fat upon his waist
zh: 因為他以自己的脂肪蒙臉， 腰上積滿肥油。

en: and has lived in desolate cities, in houses that none should inhabit, which were ready to become heaps of ruins;
zh: 他住在被毀的城邑裡， 住在沒有人居住， 注定快要成為亂堆的房屋裡。

en: he will not be rich, and his wealth will not endure, nor will his possessions spread over the earth;
zh: 他不再富足，他的財富不能持久， 他的產業也不得在地上擴張，

en: he will not depart from darkness; the flame will dry up his shoots, and by the breath of his mouth he will depart.
zh: 他不能離開黑暗， 火燄必燒乾他的嫩枝， 他必因 神口中的氣而離去。

en: Let him not trust in emptiness, deceiving himself, for emptiness will be his payment.
zh: 他不信靠虛假，自己欺騙自己， 因為虛假必成為他的報應。

en: It will be paid in full before his time, and his branch will not be green.
zh: 他的日期未到以先，這事必成全， 他的枝子，也不青綠。

en: He will shake off his unripe grape like the vine, and cast off his blossom like the olive tree.
zh: 他必像葡萄樹未熟的葡萄掉落一樣， 又如橄欖樹的花朵一開就謝一般。

en: For the company of the godless is barren, and fire consumes the tents of bribery.
zh: 因為不敬虔的人必不能生育， 火必吞滅收受賄賂者的帳幕。

en: They conceive trouble and give birth to evil, and their womb prepares deceit."
zh: 他們所懷的是罪惡，所生的是罪孽， 他們腹中所預備的是詭詐。”
